settings.label: Use CPU JIT
settings.description: Enable CPU JIT recompiler for better performance

settings.label: Use Multi-Core
settings.description: Enable multi-core CPU emulation

settings.label: Use Hardware Renderer
settings.description: Use GPU for rendering instead of software

settings.label: Resolution Factor
settings.description: 0=Auto, 1=Native, 2=2x, 3=3x, 4=4x, 5=5x

settings.label: VSync
settings.description: Enable vertical sync

settings.label: Use Shader JIT
settings.description: Enable shader JIT compilation

settings.label: Accurate Shader Multiplication
settings.description: Use accurate shader multiplication (fixes some games)

settings.label: Texture Filter
settings.description: 0=None, 1=Anime4K, 2=Bicubic, 3=ScaleForce, 4=xBRZ

settings.label: Single Window Mode
settings.description: Render both screens in a single window instead of separate windows. Close Citra before saving changes.

settings.label: Start in Fullscreen
settings.description: Launch Citra directly in fullscreen mode

settings.label: Show Dock Widget Headers
settings.description: Show title bars on docked widgets

settings.label: Show Filter Bar
settings.description: Show the game list filter/search bar

settings.label: Show Status Bar
settings.description: Show the bottom status bar (FPS, frame time, etc.)

settings.label: Confirm Exit While Running
settings.description: Ask for confirmation before closing while a game is running

settings.label: Hide Mouse When Inactive
settings.description: Auto-hide the mouse cursor when idle

settings.label: Pause When In Background
settings.description: Pause emulation when the Citra window loses focus

settings.label: Mute Audio When In Background
settings.description: Mute audio when the Citra window loses focus

settings.label: Screen Layout
settings.description: How the top and bottom 3DS screens are arranged

settings.label: Swap Screens
settings.description: Swap top and bottom screen positions

settings.label: Rotate Screens Upright
settings.description: Rotate both screens 90 degrees (for games designed to be held sideways)

settings.label: Large Screen Proportion
settings.description: Size ratio of the large screen relative to the small screen in Large Screen layout

settings.label: Volume
settings.description: Audio output volume percentage

settings.label: Output Type
settings.description: Audio output backend

settings.label: Audio Stretching
settings.description: Stretch audio to reduce stuttering
